---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What do you want?

Describe the feature or change you'd like. Be specific about the desired behavior.

## Why?

What problem does this solve? How does it help your use case?

## Suggested Approach (Optional)

If you have ideas on how this could be implemented, share them here. If you've prototyped it in a fork, link it.

## Additional Context

Any related issues, screenshots, or references.
